title: Assistant Store Manager - Vijay Sales - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Vijay Sales - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Vijay Sales in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijay Sales:
Vijay Sales is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales!
